Apple tree with decent size apples (slightly smaller than your fist).  It's located on an undeveloped lot.  I'm sure it's private, but I've seen multiple families out harvesting bags of fruit in season... I wouldn't know who to ask for permission. Access: Priv

Raspberries grow through the fence at Mike Yokel Park.  Ready to pick in late July and August, but you've got to get to the park early in the day if you want to beat the kids to the fruit;) Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: July-August.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

These raspberries are on the East side of the yoga studio... they are abundant and never harvested by anyone!  They do belong to the yoga studio, and when I asked, they were surprised to hear that they were out there (?) and said go ahead.  I would re-ask each
